series_metadata.series_description: Records generated during the appeal process on Social Security disability claims. Records may include: log of files and/or documents removed from the paper file to be used in the hearing process; schedules and itineraries for the hearings; hearing reports & decisions; medical records; and any additional record created or used during the hearing process.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: All records used during the hearing process are maintained in the paper file and are transferred to SSA upon final determination. Retain file copies until no longer of administrative value and then destroy. ; Paper: All records used during the hearing process are maintained in the paper file and are transferred to SSA upon final determination. Retain file copies until no longer of administrative value and then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
